findings.evidence: `Regular.lean:145` proves `orbitMap_injective` from `eq_of_fiber_smul_eq_fiber_smul hp`; `Regular.lean:155` defines `deckEquivFiberOfSurjective` from `orbitMap_injective hp e` and an explicit `hsurj`, with no use of `IsRegular` until `deckEquivFiber` at line 163.
findings.fix: Move `orbitMap_injective`, `deckEquivFiberOfSurjective`, and their `OfSurjective` simp lemmas to `TauCeti/AlgebraicTopology/UniversalCover/Deck/Connected.lean`; keep only `deckEquivFiber` and regularity-specific wrappers in `Deck.Regular`.
findings.issue: `orbitMap_injective` and `deckEquivFiberOfSurjective` are not regular-cover declarations: they use only a preconnected covering plus an explicit orbit-map surjectivity hypothesis, so placing them in `Deck.Regular` hides broadly useful connected-cover API in a later, more specific file.

summary: Most of the regular-action material is in the right Deck subhierarchy with direct imports, but the connected-cover orbit-map/evaluation API is generic connected-cover material and should not live in `Deck.Regular`.
